name: CrowdStrike Charlotte AI AgentWorks
description: No-code development platform for building, testing, and deploying custom security AI agents. Integrates with CrowdStrike Falcon platform and partner ecosystems (AWS, Anthropic, OpenAI). Enables teams to create autonomous security agents for threat response and incident management.
notes: Launched at RSA Conference 2026. No-code builder for security-specific agents. Ecosystem includes AWS, Anthropic, and OpenAI partnerships.
